Off Calendar Mar-02-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kennedy P. Richardson, Esq. of MARION'S INN 510/451-6770, for defendants KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC, THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC, KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, LEWIS LEHMAN, M.D. and JEFFREY BEANE, M.D., moving to compel arbitration
Felicia C. Curran, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF JOHN D. WINER 434-9300, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANTs KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC, THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC, KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, LEWIS LEHMAN and JEFFREY BEANE'S DEFENDANTS KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN, INC, THE PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP, INC, KAISER FOUNDATION HOSPITALS, LEWIS LEHMAN and JEFFREY BEANE'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION: GRANTED without prejudice; all claims shall be sent to arbitration except the request for injunctive relief under B&P Code 17200 and 8th cause of action (Plaintiff Sheila Ellis' IIED claim). Parties can resolve the issues in arbitration. Defendant is to prepare an order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
